topic: Philippine Justice Secretary's order to arrest Sen. Bato dela Rosa and the counter-narrative surrounding former President Duterte.
tweet1: DOJ just ordered Bato dela Rosa's arrest over ICC warrant. Yet, some are framing Duterte's legal challenges as a 'test of humanity.'
tweet2: Justice Sec. Fredderick Vida announced the NBI and PNP must arrest Sen. Bato for the ICC warrant. He even warned those who might help Bato evade the law. Accountabilities are clear here.
tweet3: But then @fierceLady08 posts a black-and-white Duterte portrait, calling his 'vulnerable hour' a 'test of humanity.' This isn't about humanity; it's narrative control to deflect accountability.
tweet4: This simultaneous push for arrest and an appeal to emotion for Duterte isn't a coincidence. It's an attempt to undermine the rule of law by re-contextualizing alleged abuses. History will remember both the actions and these attempts to manipulate the story.
